{{Infobox location
| name = Optasia
| introduced = Of Dawn and Darkness
}}

''See also: [[Optasia Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The Optasia is [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]]'s true throne, located within his private quarters. Physically, it resembles a cage of [[steel]] bars and wires twisted into a shape similar to a chair. It functions as the central hub for a global network of over three hundred concealed nodes and relays, which were constructed with the assistance of [[Magisters]] and alchemists. This system allows a user to project their [[Intent]] across the world, magnifying their perception so they can [[Read]] events or buildings on a global scale. Historically, the term referred to primitive devices used for divination and predicting the future, but the current version is a massive technological advancement. The primary purpose of the Optasia is to allow [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]] to monitor and respond to the [[Great Elders]] from a distance, providing a way for humanity to communicate with them. However, using the device is extremely dangerous; it forces the user to absorb all the information and [[Intent]] it collects, which includes the corrupting taint of the [[Elders]]. This sensory overload carries a significant risk of insanity. Because of these dangers, only [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]], [[Regents]], or potentially high-ranking [[Guild Heads]] are considered capable of using it safely. The device is a highly contested object, having been subject to sabotage attempts, battles between the [[Imperial Guards]] and the [[Sleepless]], and various efforts by different factions to control its power.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The Optasia is an ancient relic and controllable device used as a throne within [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]]'s personal quarters. This flesh-shrouded cage of [[steel]] bars functions as a global amplification relay, allowing a [[Reader]] to expand their awareness and perceive anything on the planet through a vast network. By catching deadly [[Intent]] and sending it to a thousand relays, the device can carry information or damage across the world. While the [[Elders]] seek to possess this artifact for their plans, it remains a necessary tool for an [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|Emperor]] to speak to 'them' and check for truths. Although fighting near the device may have caused a [[crack in the sky]], the Optasia itself has sustained no permanent damage and requires specialized preparation for safe use.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">24</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Optasia]] is a location or entity that can be controlled.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c4">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Cheska]] lost half her crew and ship in an attack from the [[Optasia]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c6">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Optasia]] is located in [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]]’s personal quarters.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Optasia]] is a device used for global amplification relays.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c8">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Jerri]] is standing with her back to the [[Optasia]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c10">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Optasia]] is a flesh-shrouded cage of [[steel]] bars.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Optasia]] can catch deadly [[Intent]] and send it out to a thousand relays around the world.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Optasia]] has a network that carries information or damage across the world.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Optasia]] is an object that the [[Elders]] seek to possess.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Optasia]] is a device that must be activated by [[Reading]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c12">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Optasia]] is necessary for an [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|Emperor]] to speak to 'them'.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Optasia]] can be used to check for truths.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[crack in the sky]] may have been caused by fighting near the [[Optasia]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c14">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Optasia]] is an entity or object involved in the [[Elders]]' plan.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Optasia]] has sustained no permanent damage.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Optasia]] is a cage of [[steel]] bars resembling the skeleton of a great chair.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Optasia]] is an ancient artifact of [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c16">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Optasia]]'s throne has a matrix of [[steel]] bars.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Optasia]] is a device that enhances perception and allows a user to [[Read]] a building on the other side of the planet when connected to it.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Optasia]] is a relic of [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]] used as a throne.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Optasia]] expands awareness via a network of relays to allow [[Reading]] of anything on the planet.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Optasia]] is an object that a [[Reader]] can use.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c18">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Optasia]] is an item used by the [[Empire]] that requires specialized preparation to use safely.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Kelarac]] asks [[Calder]] to deliver the [[Optasia]] to him.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c22">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Originally serving as a pre-[[Imperial]] divination tool used by primitive men to predict the future or divine danger, the Optasia was later integrated into [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]]'s personal chambers as his true throne. This global system consists of 312 concealed nodes that function as a network of receptors, allowing [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]] to magnify his [[Reading]] and monitor the intent of others across the world. To operate the device, a user must open themselves to it and process everything it collects, which enables them to take action against [[Great Elders]] from a distance at the cost of exposing themselves to those same entities. Although [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]] has produced hazy bubbles while using the device, he has also been unable to utilize it, and the Optasia has ultimately been successfully destroyed.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">14</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[The Emperor]] is unable to use the [[Optasia]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c7">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Optasia]] is [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]]'s true throne, built into his personal chambers.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c13">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Optasia]] uses a global network of receptors to expand and channel the [[Emperor's power]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c13" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Using the [[Optasia]] requires the user to open themselves to it and [[Read]] everything it picks up.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c13" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Optasia]] allows the user to monitor [[Great Elders]] and take action against them at a distance.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c13" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Using the [[Optasia]] exposes the user to the attention of the [[Great Elders]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c13" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Optasia]] is a device that can be used to feed oneself to [[Kthanikahr]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c15">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|An [[Optasia]] was a device used in primitive men's culture to divine danger or predict the future.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c16">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Optasia]] is a global system of 312 concealed nodes designed to allow [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]] to [[Read]] [[Intent]] from around the world.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Optasia]] is a pre-[[Imperial]] divination tool.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Optasia]] has been successfully destroyed.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c17">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Optasia]] is a device used by [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c20">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[The Emperor]] produced hazy bubbles in the [[Optasia]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c20" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Optasia]] is a device that can magnify [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]]'s [[Reading]] to a global scale.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c20" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The Optasia is an ancient, world-bending device built into the wall of [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]]’s personal chambers that resembles a nest of [[steel]] bars and wires. Protected by alchemically treated barbed wire designed to wound and incapacitate intruders, this tool functions as a node within a global network of statues used to amplify [[Reading]] and distribute [[Intent]] across the world. While it can be used to project consciousness or strike at [[Great Elders]], the device also provides vital magnification for [[Calder]], leaving him an easy target without it. During his time in [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]]'s chambers, [[Bliss]] assists [[Calder]] in using the machine, which ultimately serves as his true throne. The device is capable of taking over a person, and it was through the Optasia that both [[Calder]] and [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]] eventually sank, an event that caused a [[crack in the sky]].}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">17</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Optasia]] is a device used to amplify [[Reading]] and send it across the world.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c2">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Optasia]] is a device built into the wall of [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]]’s personal chambers that resembles a nest of [[steel]] bars and wires.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c4">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Optasia]] is covered by a mesh of barbed wire that is invested to wound intruders and treated with [[alchemy]] to incapacitate anyone who touches it.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Bliss]] can help [[Calder]] use the [[Optasia]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c9">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Optasia]] is an ancient, world-bending tool that distributes [[Intent]] throughout the world.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Optasia]] is a device used to project consciousness.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c11">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Optasia]] was in [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]]'s chambers with [[Calder]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Optasia]] was [[Calder]]'s true throne.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c13">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Kelarac]] intends to sit upon the [[Optasia]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c19">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Optasia]] made the [[crack in the sky]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Optasia]] is a global network of statues designed and invested by [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]] to amplify [[Reading]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c20">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Optasia]] is a node or device that can be used to strike at [[Great Elders]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c21">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Optasia]] provides magnification for [[Calder]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c21" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Without the [[Optasia]], [[Calder]] is an easy target.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c22">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] possesses an object called the [[Optasia]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c23">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] and [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]] sank into the [[Optasia]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c25">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Optasia]] can take over a person.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c25" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Of Killers and Kings ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Optasia]] is an object that could potentially free the [[Great Elders]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c14">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[The Emperor]] shared a vision with [[Shera]] through the [[Optasia]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c25">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|There are rumors of something the [[Optasia]] has done.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c27">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 27</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|“Yes, the Optasia is in the Emperor’s personal quarters.”<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c6" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|"It’s a relic of the Emperor," Jerri answered, in a tone that suggested he was an idiot. "You sit in it."<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c16" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|"As I understand it, the device will expand your awareness. Thanks to a network of relays, you’ll be able to Read practically anything on the planet from this spot."<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c16" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|“Yes, and also I can help you use the Optasia.”<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c9" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|“You have to open yourself to it,” Lucan said immediately, “which means Reading everything it picks up.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c13" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire locations]]
